type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: NPRI calculations for the 2011 reporting year have determined both NOx emissions have increased by more than 10% from 2010 to 2011 at the Cairo Gas Battery. The increase in emissions is attributed to two operating changes that took place in 2011. First, the running time of the second Caterpillar compressor located on site increased from 5664 operating hours in 2010 to 8634 hours in 2011. Second, a line heater was been added to the site in 2011 that was not operating in 2010.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: NPRI calculations for the 2011 reporting year have determined CO emissions have increased by more than 10% from 2010 to 2011 at the Cairo Gas Battery. The increase in emissions is attributed to two operating changes that took place in 2011. First, the running time of the second Caterpillar compressor located on site increased from 5664 operating hours in 2010 to 8634 hours in 2011. Second, a line heater was been added to the site in 2011 that was not operating in 2010.
